heading: Citizens; residence in island of citizens of United States
label: 733a Citizens; residence in island of citizens of United States
text: All citizens of the United States who have resided or who shall after , reside in the island for one year shall be citizens of Puerto Rico.March 4, 1927
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , Aliens and Nationality.section 5a of Title 8
Change of Name“Puerto Rico” substituted in text for “Porto Rico” pursuant to act , which is classified to .May 17, 1932section 731a of this title
